title: Fantasia 2016
body:
Photographed by Ken Hamblin III. Westword's 2018 reopen feature caption: "Colin Ward and friends welcoming people to Rhinoceropolis for the 2016 edition of Fantasia."

Part of a series running from at least 2009 (earliest archive reference) through 2016. See [[events/fantasia-2011]] for the series' documented origins.
